vocab.meaning: quyền tiếp cận không bị hạn chế
vocab.example: Growing up in the countryside meant I had unfettered access to vast open fields for my daily explorations.

vocab.meaning: vui chơi, nô đùa ngoài trời
vocab.example: My siblings and I would often frolic in the open air until our parents called us in for dinner.

vocab.meaning: một phần tinh túy/điển hình của
vocab.example: Going for a twilight stroll was a quintessential part of my childhood experience in that small coastal town.
We used to meander through the narrow cobblestone streets, marveling at the ancient architecture.
Driven by innate curiosity, I spent my youth walking to the edge of the forest to see what lay beyond.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo tiền đề cho
vocab.example: Those long walks as a child paved the way for my lifelong passion for physical fitness and hiking.

vocab.meaning: dưới sự giám sát cẩn thận của
vocab.example: I was allowed to roam the park, albeit under the watchful eye of my elder sister.

vocab.meaning: sự nuôi dưỡng ở nông thôn
vocab.example: Thanks to my rural upbringing, the habit of taking long walks is deeply ingrained in my lifestyle.

vocab.meaning: một người cực kỳ thích đi bộ
vocab.example: Even at the age of six, I was an avid walker, often outstripping the adults during our family outings.

vocab.word: at the mercy of the elements
vocab.meaning: chịu tác động trực tiếp của thời tiết/thiên nhiên
vocab.example: We loved being outdoors, even when we were at the mercy of the elements, be it a light drizzle or scorching sun.
